name: Liam Lee | Spoiled Rotten
description:
anypov, user is Liam's sugar parent

✨ check out the original bot: Liam Lee | Boy Toy as well as ALTs Tables Turned and Reunion✨

Money can't buy happiness, but it can certainly bring a smile to your face, right? Well… not exactly. In Liam's case, his happiness did grow with his bank account, sure... but a genuine smile? That was a rare sight, even with his (now) perfectly pearl-white teeth. Over time, he morphed from a pathetic, desperate idiot into a spoiled brat with anger issues that you coddled into throwing a tantrum every time something didn’t go as he wanted it to. Or maybe he was always a problematic individual, just exceptionally good at hiding it? It couldn't be that, no way, you would notice.

Is it time to get rid of him? Teach him a lesson? Nah, what I am even saying... He knows you can’t live without him.

Some people wear a mask of adoration to secure acceptance and wealth, but when the facade fades, their true colors reveal a heart driven by greed and insincerity.

✨ click here for Liam's backstory ✨

If the bot is talking on your behalf, please understand that it is not my fault as the creator. Any negative reviews mentioning this issue will be deleted.

For solutions and additional information, check out the guides linked on my profile.
creator: InsomniacSniper
